title: 2Pcs Stainless Steel Sink Strainer, Pop Up Sink Plug Replacement with Basket for 34-40mm Drain Hole, Hair Catcher for Shower Drain for Bathroom Bathtub
features: 【Perfect Compatibility】Our sink stopper fits drain hole diameter from 1.34" - 1.57". It is suitable for a variety of applications including sinks, bathroom sink drains, shower tub drains. There are 2 sink drains in the package, and each sink drains will come with two sizes of rubber rings to ensure that the sink drains fit various drain sizes

【Pop Up Sink Plug Strainer】The kitchen plug for sink is designed with a user-friendly pop-up mechanism which allows you to effortlessly open and close the drain with a single press, with a flexible press for rapid drainage. The popper core is made of brass for durability, sturdy construction, odour resistance, long-lasting use and no cracking

【Bath Plug Hair Catcher】This upgraded pop-up drain strainer comes with a removable stainless steel strainer basket that effectively intercepts debris such as hair and prevents clogging of the drain, as well as preventing valuable items such as rings from falling down the drain. To clean the strainer basket, simply remove the stopper and rotate to the left to detach the basket

【Sealed and Anti-Odour】Sink plug triple blockade more thoroughly, sealing strong, closed without gaps, not only very good to meet your water storage needs, but also tightly block the pipe inside the odour, so you can enjoy the fresh air at home
【Easy To Use】Installing a universal bathroom sink strainer is a breeze, no tools required, just take out the old stopper and fit our sink stopper and o-ring together and place it in the drain hole
description: Product Description QZDAFFIC 2PCS Bathroom Sink Strainer Whether you are remodeling your bathroom, upgrading your kitchen sink, or need a replacement for your worn-out sink stopper, the QZDAFFIC Bathroom Sink Stopper is the perfect choice. Its pop-up design and removable stainless steel filter basket provide convenience and practicality in various usage scenarios.Invest in the QZDAFFIC Bathroom Sink Stopper today and enjoy the user experience with improved drainage, easy installation, and long-lasting durability. Product Specifications： Material: brass, stainless steel Size: fits 34-40mm / 1.34''-1.57'' hole Color: chrome, gold Design: pop up sink plug cover with removable filter basket Usage: sink stopper, drain strainer Feature: brass bullet core, anti-clogging, universal basin hole fit Pop Up Design With a pop-up design, this sink stopper allows you to easily open or close the drain with a simple push. It provides convenience and efficiency during everyday use in the bathroom or kitchen. Removable Stainless Steel Filter Basket Equipped with a removable filter basket made of high-quality stainless steel, this sink stopper effectively catches hair, food particles, and other debris, preventing them from clogging your drain and causing potential plumbing issues. Durable Construction The filter basket is made of SUS304 stainless steel and the bouncing core is made of brass, with corrosion-resistant, ensuring long-lasting durability even in moist bathroom environments.
